name: Calculatrice Gravier Décoratif
seo_title: Calculatrice Gravier – Tonnes et Yards Cubes
seo_description: Calculez les tonnes et yards cubes de gravier décoratif nécessaires. Entrez les dimensions, la profondeur et le type de roche pour obtenir les quantités exactes.
description: Calculateur 1119. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Calculateur 1119. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
mistakes: Spreading rock too thin — under 3 cm allows weeds to push through
Skipping landscape fabric — rocks sink into soil without a barrier
Using the wrong rock size — 10–20 mm is standard for decorative gravel
formula_display: Area = L × W; Volume = area × depth; Weight = volume × density
